required_elements.title: Security Responsibility Designation
required_elements.question_text: The facility has a designated individual responsible for security.

required_elements.title: Security Roles Defined
required_elements.question_text: The facility has defined security roles for key positions.

required_elements.title: Transportation Security Protocol
required_elements.question_text: The facility has transportation-specific security protocols in place.

required_elements.title: Aviation Access Control
required_elements.question_text: The facility has specialized access control measures for aviation operations.

required_elements.title: Aircraft Security
required_elements.question_text: The facility has security measures for aircraft and related infrastructure.
